proxy-host.title: Proxy Host
proxy-host.description: The host to proxy the emails to

proxy-port.title: Proxy Port
proxy-port.description: The port used by the proxy

proxy-user.title: Proxy User
proxy-user.description: The user to authenticate with the proxy host

proxy-password.title: Proxy Password
proxy-password.description: The password to authenticate with the proxy host

greylisting-enable.title: Enable Greylisting
greylisting-enable.description: Whether to enable greylisting on inbound mail

greylisting-delay.title: Greylist Delay
greylisting-delay.description: Seconds a new sender triplet must wait before being accepted

greylisting-whitelist-clients.title: Greylisting Whitelist Clients
greylisting-whitelist-clients.description: Additional client patterns to whitelist in postgrey, one entry per item.

greylisting-whitelist-recipients.title: Greylisting Whitelist Recipients
greylisting-whitelist-recipients.description: Additional recipient patterns to whitelist in postgrey, one entry per item.

outbound-domain-whitelist.title: Outbound Domain Whitelist
outbound-domain-whitelist.description: List of domains allowed for outbound proxy

relay-domain.title: Relay Domain
relay-domain.description: The domain that will point to all relay instances

sr-url.description: Software release URL for this relay. If empty, defaults to the cluster's software release URL.
